title: derris nitidula
intro: Derris nitidula, also known as the Derris or Rotan, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae, native to tropical regions in Asia and Africa. The roots and seeds of Derris nitidula have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for their insecticidal properties, which are used to kill certain types of worms and insects. The medicinal properties of Derris nitidula are attributed to its rotenone content, a natural insecticide that also has analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, providing relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Derris nitidula is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as treating various infections and skin conditions.
